name: Underdog
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>形</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>勢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>反</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your turn, negate the effects of all face-up monsters your opponent controls. During your opponent's turn, negate the effects of all face-up monsters you control.
eff: During your turn, negate the effects of all face-up monsters your opponent controls. During your opponent's turn, negate the effects of all face-up monsters you control.

mst: Negates the effects of your Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
